playlist_strategy: Progressive intensity build-up starting with heavy rhythmic focus and escalating to aggressive, high-BPM anthems designed for PR attempts and maximum physical exertion.

tracks.title: Iron Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: WAKE UP YOUR MUSCLES | Epic Gym Warmup Music
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic midtempo electronic, dark atmosphere, heavy rhythmic pulse, slow build, intense anticipation
tracks.image_prompt: Close up of chalked hands gripping a cold steel barbell, stark lighting, blue shadows, professional cinematic photography
tracks.youtube_description: Perfect track to get your mind right before hitting the cold iron. Slowly builds your focus for the heavy sets ahead.

tracks.title: Unbreakable Will
tracks.youtube_title: NEVER SURRENDER | Heavy Metal Workout Motivation
tracks.style_prompt: Heavy modern metalcore, driving guitar riffs, explosive drum fills, relentless energy, aggressive but melodic
tracks.image_prompt: Muscular athlete mid-deadlift at a hardcore gym, screaming with effort, sweat flying, dramatic red neon lighting, high contrast
tracks.youtube_description: Time to work. This heavy metal instrumental will push you through those grinding early sets.

tracks.title: Chalk & Blood
tracks.youtube_title: BEAST MODE ACTIVATED | Aggressive Phonk For Lifting
tracks.target_audience: Gen Z gym goers, phonk fans, PR chasers
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive drift phonk, distorted heavy bass, iconic cowbell melody, fast paced, underground gym vibe
tracks.image_prompt: Silhouette of a massive bodybuilder in a dark warehouse gym lit only by a single purple neon light tube, gritty aesthetic
tracks.youtube_description: Pure unadulterated phonk energy for when you need to go completely beast mode on the weights.

tracks.title: Gravity Defied
tracks.style_prompt: Epic orchestral dubstep, massive brass chords colliding with aggressive bass drops, stadium energy, huge soundscape
tracks.image_prompt: Weightlifter perfectly locking out a massive snatch overhead, chalk dust lingering in the air, stadium lights shining down like a halo
tracks.youtube_description: For those moments when you need to move the immovable. Feel the epic energy of orchestral brass and heavy bass.

tracks.title: The Grindstone
tracks.youtube_title: EMBRACE THE GRIND | Intensely Dark Techno
tracks.style_prompt: Dark industrial peak-time techno, relentless 4/4 pounding kick rum, hypnotic acid lines, underground warehouse rave energy
tracks.image_prompt: Rows of heavy dumbbells receding into the dark, a lone lifter repping out back rows, neon green highlights, cyberpunk aesthetic
tracks.youtube_description: Put your head down and work. This dark techno track will lock you into the zone for high-volume hypertrophy sets.

tracks.title: One More Rep
tracks.youtube_title: ONE MORE REP | Hardstyle Gym Anthems
tracks.target_audience: Hardcore gym goers, hardstyle fans, Zyzz legacy followers
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric hardstyle, massive supersaw melodies, insanely hard distorted gated kicks, absolute maximum festival energy
tracks.image_prompt: A perfectly shredded athlete hitting a legendary pose, glowing aura, bright synthwave colors, euphoric and godlike atmosphere
tracks.youtube_description: When your muscle gives out, your mind takes over. Pure euphoric hardstyle to force out that one final rep.

tracks.title: Berserker State
tracks.youtube_title: GO BERSERK | Viking War Drums & Metal
tracks.listening_scenario: Setting a personal record, heavy squats
tracks.style_prompt: Pounding viking war drums mixed with heavy metal guitar riffs, deep tribal chants, primal and raw warrior energy
tracks.image_prompt: Massive strongman lifting an atlas stone, roaring like a warrior, snowing environment, fire barrels illuminating the scene
tracks.youtube_description: Tap into ancient warrior genetics. Perfect soundtrack for attempting a massive PR or strongman event.

tracks.title: Neuro-Stimulant
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk drum and bass, hyper-kinetic breakbeats, tearing distorted basslines, futuristic and incredibly fast-paced
tracks.image_prompt: Athlete sprinting on a curved treadmill, motion blur effects, glowing neon yellow streaks indicating incredible speed, sci-fi gym setting
tracks.youtube_description: Pure sonic adrenaline. Fast-paced neurofunk DnB to push you through the most agonizing high-intensity interval training.

tracks.title: The Last Stand
tracks.youtube_title: EMPTY THE TANK | Epic Trap Brass
tracks.listening_scenario: The very last exercise, emptying the tank
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic heavy trap, massive triumphant brass stabs, rattling 808s, swagger and swagger, the soundtrack of a champion finishing strong
tracks.image_prompt: Low angle shot of a victorious athlete dropping the weights after the final set, sweat pouring down face, backlit by golden spotlight
tracks.youtube_description: Leave nothing in the tank. This heavy trap anthem is your soundtrack for that brutal final set.

tracks.title: Iron Aftermath
tracks.listening_scenario: Cool-down, leaving the gym, admiring the pump
tracks.target_audience: Late night gym goers, synthwave fans
tracks.style_prompt: Dark atmospheric synthwave, slow driving pulse, retro 80s analog synthesizers, cool and victorious night-drive feeling
tracks.image_prompt: Looking at gym reflections in the mirror, wearing a hoodie leaving late at night, rainy window outside glowing with synthwave neon pink and blue streetlights
tracks.youtube_description: You survived. Now enjoy the pump. A cooling dark synthwave track for your walk out of the gym.
